exercises.prompt: Name the 7 SI base units. (Hint: length, mass, time, electric current, temperature, amount of substance, luminous intensity)
exercises.solution: The 7 SI base units are: meter (length), kilogram (mass), second (time), ampere (electric current), kelvin (temperature), mole (amount), candela (brightness). Scientists use these everywhere!
hints: Think about what you measure in physics
